title: strophostyles helvola
intro: Strophostyles helvola, also known as prairie bean or wild bean, is a perennial vine native to North America that belongs to the legume family. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Strophostyles helvola include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and act as a natural diuretic. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential interactions and side effects.
